title: A research team from the Provincial Department of Transportation visited Tianhui Plastics Group for investigation
contentHtml:
On the morning of August 26, a research team from the Provincial Department of Transportation visited Tianhui Plastic Group to learn about the network transportation platform of the project under construction - Haojuntong.

Du Shuang, President of Tianhui Plastic Group, led the company’s senior management to attend the meeting and receive the meeting.

After listening to our company’s project report, Xiao Ziping, director of the Haigang District Transportation Bureau, said that the Haigang District Transportation Bureau would give strong support to the Haojuntong project. This project is the first network freight project in the seaport area and is an emerging project. I hope our company can do a good job in the preliminary preparations and look forward to its early launch.
titleZh: 省交通运输厅调研组到天晖塑料集团调研
contentHtmlZh:
8月26日上午，省交通运输厅调研组到天晖塑料集团参观调研，了解在建项目网络运输平台——皓俊通。

天晖塑料集团总裁杜霜带领公司高层参会接待。

在听取我公司的项目汇报后，海港区交通局局长肖子平表示对于皓俊通项目，海港区交通局给予强烈支持。该项目为海港区第一个网络货运项目，一个新兴的项目，希望我司能把前期准备工作做好，期待早日上线。
